Anastomoselekkasje ved robotkirurgi

Lesing og filtrering av data

library(norgast)
library(dplyr)
# rm(list = ls())

# RegData_raa <- norgast::NorgastHentData()$RegData # Laster rådata
RegData_raa <- norgast::NorgastHentData()$RegData
RegData <- RegData_raa |>
  # rename(Sykehusnavn = SykehusNavn) |>
  NorgastPreprosess() |> 
  mutate(ASA = ifelse(ASA==1, 2, ASA),
         straaling = (KunStraaleterapi | KjemoRadioKombo),
         erfaringsnivaa = case_when(
           Sykehusnavn %in% c("OUS-Ullevål", 
                              "Tønsberg", "SI-Hamar", "Haukeland", 
                              "Stavanger", "NS-Bodø", "UNN-Tromsø") ~ "A",
           Sykehusnavn %in% c("OUS-Radiumhospitalet", "VV-Drammen",
                              "SS-Kristiansand", "SØ-Kalnes", 
                              "Skien", "St.Olavs", "Ahus") ~ "B",
           Sykehusnavn %in% c("SI-Gjøvik", "Haugesund", "Ålesund", 
                              "Førde", "VV-Bærum", "Sykehuset Levanger") ~ "C")
  ) |> 
  filter(
    Op_gr == 2,
    FerdigForlop_v2 == 1,
    !(erfaringsnivaa == "C" & Robotassistanse == 1), # Fjerner umulige robotop.
    !is.na(erfaringsnivaa)) |>  # Fjerner sykehus som ikke op. rektum) |> 
  mutate(forste_robot = min(Aar[Robotassistanse == 1], na.rm = T), .by= Sykehusnavn) |> 
  mutate(
    forste_robot = ifelse(forste_robot == Inf, 3000, forste_robot)) |> 
  mutate(aar_erfaring_shus = Aar-forste_robot+1,
         aar_erfaring_shus = ifelse(
           aar_erfaring_shus < 0, 0, aar_erfaring_shus)) |> 
  filter(HovedDato >= "2019-01-01",
         HovedDato <= "2025-06-30") |> # Filtrer på operasjonsdato)
  filter(
    substr(toupper(Hoveddiagnose), 1, 3) == "C20", # Kun malign
    WHOECOG %in% 0:1,          # WHOECOG > 1 fjernes
    Hastegrad == 1,            # Elektive operasjoner
    Hastegrad_tid == 1,        # På ukedag og med anestesistart i normalarbeidstid
    NyAnastomose == 1,         # Ny anastomomse
    Tilgang %in% 2:3,           # Laparoskopiske inngrep, inkludert konverterte
    !is.na(AvstandAnalVerge_kat) # Fjerner tumor >15 cm fra analkant
  ) |> 
  mutate(aar_erfaring_shus2 = case_when(
    aar_erfaring_shus == 0 ~ 1,
    aar_erfaring_shus %in% 1:3 ~ 2,
    aar_erfaring_shus %in% 4:12 ~ 3)
  )

frafall <- RegData_raa |> 
  NorgastPreprosess() |> 
  mutate(ASA = ifelse(ASA==1, 2, ASA),
         straaling = (KunStraaleterapi | KjemoRadioKombo),
         erfaringsnivaa = case_when(
           Sykehusnavn %in% c("OUS-Ullevål", 
                              "Tønsberg", "SI-Hamar", "Haukeland", 
                              "Stavanger", "NS-Bodø", "UNN-Tromsø") ~ "A",
           Sykehusnavn %in% c("OUS-Radiumhospitalet", "VV-Drammen",
                              "SS-Kristiansand", "SØ-Kalnes", 
                              "Skien", "St.Olavs", "Ahus") ~ "B",
           Sykehusnavn %in% c("SI-Gjøvik", "Haugesund", "Ålesund", 
                              "Førde", "VV-Bærum", "Sykehuset Levanger") ~ "C")
  ) |> 
  filter(
    HovedDato >= "2019-01-01",
    HovedDato <= "2025-06-30", # Filtrer på operasjonsdato
    Op_gr == 2,
    FerdigForlop_v2 == 1) |>
  filter(!(erfaringsnivaa == "C" & Robotassistanse == 1), # Fjerner umulige robotop.
         !is.na(erfaringsnivaa), # Fjerner sykehus som ikke op. rektum
         !is.na(AvstandAnalVerge_kat)) |>  # Fjerner tumor >15 cm fra analkant) |>
  summarise(
    "Rektumreseksjoner" = n(),
    "Ikke-maligne" = sum(substr(toupper(Hoveddiagnose), 1, 3) != "C20"),
    "WHOECOG > 1" = sum(
      !(WHOECOG %in% 0:1) & substr(toupper(Hoveddiagnose), 1, 3) == "C20"),
    "Akuttkirugi" = sum(
      (Hastegrad_tid == 0 | Hastegrad == 2) & WHOECOG %in% 0:1 &
        substr(toupper(Hoveddiagnose), 1, 3) == "C20"),
    "Åpen kirurgi" = sum(Tilgang == 1 & !(Hastegrad_tid == 0 | Hastegrad == 2) & WHOECOG %in% 0:1 & substr(toupper(Hoveddiagnose), 1, 3) == "C20"),
    "Uten ny anastomose, konvensjonell laparoskopi (inkl. konverterte)" =
      sum(NyAnastomose != 1 & Robotassistanse == 0 & Tilgang %in% 2:3 & !(Hastegrad_tid == 0 | Hastegrad == 2) & WHOECOG %in% 0:1 & substr(toupper(Hoveddiagnose), 1, 3) == "C20", na.rm = T),
    "Uten ny anastomose, robotassistert laparoskopi (inkl. konverterte)" =
      sum(NyAnastomose != 1 & Robotassistanse == 1 & Tilgang %in% 2:3 & !(Hastegrad_tid == 0 | Hastegrad == 2) & WHOECOG %in% 0:1 & substr(toupper(Hoveddiagnose), 1, 3) == "C20", na.rm = T),
    "Operert robotassistert på sykehus uten robot" = sum(erfaringsnivaa == "C" &
                                                           Robotassistanse == 1, na.rm = T),
    "Tumor >15 cm fra analkant" = sum(is.na(AvstandAnalVerge_kat)),
    "Rektumoperert på sykehus som ikke opererer rektum" =
      sum(is.na(erfaringsnivaa)),
    "Oppfyller én eller flere eksklusjonsskriterier" =
      sum((substr(toupper(Hoveddiagnose), 1, 3) != "C20") |
            (!(WHOECOG %in% 0:1)) | (Hastegrad == 2) |
            (Hastegrad_tid == 0) |
            (Tilgang == 1) | (NyAnastomose != 1) |
            (erfaringsnivaa == "C" & Robotassistanse == 1) |
            is.na(AvstandAnalVerge_kat) | is.na(erfaringsnivaa))
  )

frafall <- data.frame("var" = names(frafall),
                      "Antall" = unlist(frafall))
names(frafall)[1] <- ""
knitr::kable(frafall, row.names = FALSE, caption = "Ekskluderte av ulike årsaker")
Ekskluderte av ulike årsaker
Antall
Rektumreseksjoner 6419
Ikke-maligne 1402

Akuttkirugi 113
Åpen kirurgi 337

Uten ny anastomose, robotassistert laparoskopi (inkl. konverterte) 1050
Operert robotassistert på sykehus uten robot 0
Tumor >15 cm fra analkant 0
Rektumoperert på sykehus som ikke opererer rektum 0

# write.csv2(frafall, "C:/regdata/norgast/robotartikkel/frafall.csv", 
# row.names = F, fileEncoding = "Latin1")

# nyanastomosetab <- RegData |>
#   summarise(UtenNyAnastomose = sum(NyAnastomose==0),
#             "Andel uten ny anastomose (%)" =
#               round(UtenNyAnastomose/n()*100, 1),
#             N = n(),
#             .by = Robotassistanse) |>
#   rename("Antall uten ny anastomose" = UtenNyAnastomose)
# 
# knitr::kable(nyanastomosetab, row.names = FALSE,
#              caption = "Antall uten ny anastomose")

other_findings <- RegData |> 
  summarise(lekkaskje = sum(Anastomoselekkasje),
            N = n(),
            .by = c(Robotassistanse, erfaringsnivaa))

x <- c(other_findings |> filter(Robotassistanse == 1 & erfaringsnivaa == "A") |> 
         select(lekkaskje) |> unlist(), 
       other_findings |> filter(Robotassistanse == 1 & erfaringsnivaa == "B") |> 
         select(lekkaskje) |> unlist()) # Vector of success counts
n <- c(other_findings |> filter(Robotassistanse == 1 & erfaringsnivaa == "A") |> 
         select(N) |> unlist(), 
       other_findings |> filter(Robotassistanse == 1 & erfaringsnivaa == "B") |> 
         select(N) |> unlist()) # Vector of total sample sizes
# Perform the two-proportion test
results_robot <- prop.test(x, n, alternative = "two.sided", conf.level = 0.95)

x <- c(other_findings |> filter(Robotassistanse == 0 & erfaringsnivaa == "A") |> 
         select(lekkaskje) |> unlist(), 
       other_findings |> filter(Robotassistanse == 0 & erfaringsnivaa == "B") |> 
         select(lekkaskje) |> unlist()) # Vector of success counts
n <- c(other_findings |> filter(Robotassistanse == 0 & erfaringsnivaa == "A") |> 
         select(N) |> unlist(), 
       other_findings |> filter(Robotassistanse == 0 & erfaringsnivaa == "B") |> 
         select(N) |> unlist()) # Vector of total sample sizes
# Perform the two-proportion test
results_conv <- prop.test(x, n, alternative = "two.sided", conf.level = 0.95)

other_findings |> filter(erfaringsnivaa %in% c("A", "B")) |> 
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = erfaringsnivaa, values_from = c(lekkaskje, N))
# A tibble: 2 × 5
  Robotassistanse lekkaskje_A lekkaskje_B   N_A   N_B
            <int>       <dbl>       <dbl> <int> <int>
1               1         132          19  1064   334
2               0          14          28   213   508
# Print the results
print(results_robot)

    2-sample test for equality of proportions with continuity correction

library(xgboost)

Attaching package: 'xgboost'
The following object is masked from 'package:dplyr':

    slice
RegData <- RegData_alle |> 
  filter(!is.na(AvstandAnalVerge_kat),
         !is.na(BMI))

tmp <- RegData |> 
  select("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
         "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet",  
         "Aar") |>
  mutate(ASA_kat = as.factor(ASA_kat) |> as.numeric(),
         straaling = as.numeric(straaling),
         AvstandAnalVerge_kat = as.numeric(AvstandAnalVerge_kat),
         bmi_forenklet = as.numeric(bmi_forenklet),
  ) |> 
  as.matrix()

training_data <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data = tmp, 
  label = RegData$Robotassistanse)

params_list <- list(
  objective = "binary:logistic",
  eval_metric = c("logloss"),
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4
)

set.seed(45)

model_xgbcv <- xgb.cv(
  params = params_list,
  data = training_data,
  nrounds = 1000,
  nfold = 5, 
  stratified = TRUE,
  early_stopping_rounds = 50,
  maximize = FALSE,
  prediction = TRUE,       
  verbose = 0
)

best_iter = model_xgbcv$best_iteration
final_model <- xgb.train(params_list, training_data, nrounds = best_iter)

ps <- predict(final_model, training_data)

formel <- Robotassistanse ~ 1  + 
  erMann + alder_kat +
  ASA_kat + straaling +
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat + bmi_forenklet

matched_data_complete <- MatchIt::matchit(formula = Robotassistanse ~ 1,
                                          data = RegData, distance = ps, 
                                          caliper = 0.2, std.caliper = T,
                                          ratio = 1,
)
matched_data <- MatchIt::match_data(matched_data_complete)
tableone::CreateTableOne(vars = c("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
                                  "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet",  
                                  "Aar"), 
                         strata = "Robotassistanse",
                         data = RegData, smd = T, test = F)|> 
  print(smd = T) |> 
  openxlsx::write.xlsx("tab_unmatched.xlsx", rowNames = T)

                           0               1               SMD

tableone::CreateTableOne(vars = c("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
                                  "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet",  
                                  "Aar", "Anastomoselekkasje"), 
                         strata = "Robotassistanse",
                         data = matched_data, smd = T, test = F) |> 
  print(smd = T) |> 
  openxlsx::write.xlsx("tab_matched.xlsx", rowNames = T)

cobalt::bal.plot(
  matched_data_complete,
  which = "both",
  var.name = "distance",
  type = "histogram",
  mirror = TRUE
)
Ignoring unknown labels:
• colour : "Treatment"
cobalt::love.plot(
  formel,
  weights = list(w1 = cobalt::get.w(matched_data_complete)),
  data = RegData,
  binary = "std",
  thresholds = c(m = .1),
  abs = T
)
Note: `s.d.denom` not specified; assuming "pooled".
outcome.formula1 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse
outcome.formula2 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse + 
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat +
  erMann + alder_kat + Aar +
  straaling + ASA_kat + 
  bmi_forenklet
outcome.formula3 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse + 
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat +
  erMann + alder_kat + Aar +
  straaling + ASA_kat + 
  bmi_forenklet + NyStomi

outcome.model1 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula1,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)
outcome.model2 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula2,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)
outcome.model3 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula3,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)

matched_data |> summarise(lekk = sum(Anastomoselekkasje)/n(), N = n(), .by = Robotassistanse)
  Robotassistanse       lekk   N

library(xgboost)
RegData <- RegData_alle |> 
  filter(!is.na(AvstandAnalVerge_kat),
         !is.na(BMI),
         Alder <= 80,
         BMI <= 30,
         AvstandAnalVerge <= 11)

tmp <- RegData |> 
  select("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
         "AvstandAnalVerge", "BMI",  
         "Aar") |>
  mutate(ASA_kat = as.factor(ASA_kat) |> as.numeric(),
         straaling = as.numeric(straaling),
         # AvstandAnalVerge_kat = as.numeric(AvstandAnalVerge_kat),
         # bmi_forenklet = as.numeric(bmi_forenklet),
  ) |> 
  as.matrix()

training_data <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data = tmp, 
  label = RegData$Robotassistanse)

params_list <- list(
  objective = "binary:logistic",
  eval_metric = c("logloss"),
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4
)

set.seed(145)

model_xgbcv <- xgb.cv(
  params = params_list,
  data = training_data,
  nrounds = 1000,
  nfold = 5, 
  stratified = TRUE,
  early_stopping_rounds = 50,
  maximize = FALSE,
  prediction = TRUE,       
  verbose = 0
)

best_iter = model_xgbcv$best_iteration
final_model <- xgb.train(params_list, training_data, nrounds = best_iter)

ps <- predict(final_model, training_data)

formel <- Robotassistanse ~ 1  + 
  erMann + alder_kat +
  ASA_kat + straaling +
  AvstandAnalVerge + BMI

matched_data_complete <- MatchIt::matchit(formula = Robotassistanse ~ 1,
                                          data = RegData, distance = ps, 
                                          caliper = 0.001, std.caliper = T#,
                                          # method = "optimal"
                                          # ratio = 1,
)
matched_data <- MatchIt::match_data(matched_data_complete)
tableone::CreateTableOne(vars = c("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
                                  "AvstandAnalVerge", "BMI",  
                                  "Aar", "NyStomi"), 
                         strata = "Robotassistanse",
                         data = RegData, smd = T, test = F)|> 
  print(smd = T) |> 
  openxlsx::write.xlsx("tab_unmatched_nystomi.xlsx", rowNames = T)
                              Stratified by Robotassistanse
                               0               1               SMD   
  n                                509             642               
  erMann (mean (SD))              0.58 (0.49)     0.62 (0.49)   0.080
  Alder (mean (SD))              65.58 (9.74)    63.84 (10.56)  0.172
  ASA_kat = 3/4 (%)                104 (20.4)       99 (15.4)   0.131
  straaling = TRUE (%)             120 (23.6)      218 (34.0)   0.231
  AvstandAnalVerge (mean (SD))    8.01 (2.20)     8.16 (2.25)   0.069
  BMI (mean (SD))                24.74 (2.91)    24.89 (2.89)   0.052
  Aar (mean (SD))              2021.54 (1.73)  2022.33 (1.81)   0.450
  NyStomi (mean (SD))             0.71 (0.45)     0.56 (0.50)   0.316
tableone::CreateTableOne(vars = c("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
                                  "AvstandAnalVerge", "BMI",  
                                  "Aar", "NyStomi"), 
                         strata = "Robotassistanse",
                         data = matched_data, smd = T, test = F) |> 
  print(smd = T) |> 
  openxlsx::write.xlsx("tab_matched_nystomi.xlsx", rowNames = T)
                              Stratified by Robotassistanse
                               0               1               SMD   
  n                                213             213               
  erMann (mean (SD))              0.58 (0.50)     0.60 (0.49)   0.038
  Alder (mean (SD))              64.38 (8.94)    64.34 (9.16)   0.004
  ASA_kat = 3/4 (%)                 21 ( 9.9)       24 (11.3)   0.046
  straaling = TRUE (%)              51 (23.9)       51 (23.9)  <0.001
  AvstandAnalVerge (mean (SD))    8.25 (2.10)     8.37 (2.10)   0.056
  BMI (mean (SD))                25.02 (2.41)    25.08 (2.63)   0.027
  Aar (mean (SD))              2021.92 (1.75)  2022.10 (1.75)   0.102
  NyStomi (mean (SD))             0.70 (0.46)     0.52 (0.50)   0.391
cobalt::bal.plot(
  matched_data_complete,
  which = "both",
  var.name = "distance",
  type = "histogram",
  mirror = TRUE
)
Ignoring unknown labels:
• colour : "Treatment"
cobalt::love.plot(
  formel,
  weights = list(w1 = cobalt::get.w(matched_data_complete)),
  data = RegData,
  binary = "std",
  thresholds = c(m = .1),
  abs = T
)
Note: `s.d.denom` not specified; assuming "pooled".
outcome.formula1 <- NyStomi ~ 1 + Robotassistanse
outcome.formula2 <- NyStomi ~ 1 + Robotassistanse + 
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat +
  erMann + alder_kat + Aar +
  straaling + ASA_kat + 
  bmi_forenklet


outcome.model1 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula1,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)
outcome.model2 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula2,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)


param1 <- exp(coef((outcome.model1)))
param2 <- exp(confint((outcome.model1)))
Waiting for profiling to be done...
param3 <- exp(coef((outcome.model2)))
param4 <- exp(confint((outcome.model2)))
Waiting for profiling to be done...
param5 <- bind_cols(as.data.frame(param1), as.data.frame(param2))
param6 <- bind_cols(as.data.frame(param3), as.data.frame(param4))

write.csv2(param5, "param5.csv")
library(xgboost)
RegData <- RegData_alle |> 
  filter(!is.na(AvstandAnalVerge_kat),
         !is.na(BMI),
         aar_erfaring_shus2 == 3 | Robotassistanse == 0)

tmp <- RegData |> 
  select("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
         "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet") |>
  mutate(ASA_kat = as.factor(ASA_kat) |> as.numeric(),
         straaling = as.numeric(straaling),
         AvstandAnalVerge_kat = as.numeric(AvstandAnalVerge_kat),
         bmi_forenklet = as.numeric(bmi_forenklet)
  ) |> 
  as.matrix()

training_data <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data = tmp, 
  label = RegData$Robotassistanse)

params_list <- list(
  objective = "binary:logistic",
  eval_metric = c("logloss"),
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4
)

set.seed(45)

model_xgbcv <- xgb.cv(
  params = params_list,
  data = training_data,
  nrounds = 1000,
  nfold = 5, 
  stratified = TRUE,
  early_stopping_rounds = 50,
  maximize = FALSE,
  prediction = TRUE,       
  verbose = 0
)

best_iter = model_xgbcv$best_iteration
final_model <- xgb.train(params_list, training_data, nrounds = best_iter)

ps <- predict(final_model, training_data)

formel <- Robotassistanse ~ 1  + 
  erMann + alder_kat +
  ASA_kat + straaling +
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat + bmi_forenklet

matched_data_complete <- MatchIt::matchit(formula = Robotassistanse ~ 1,
                                          data = RegData, distance = ps, 
                                          caliper = 0.125, std.caliper = T
)
matched_data <- MatchIt::match_data(matched_data_complete)
tableone::CreateTableOne(vars = c("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
                                  "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet"), 
                         strata = "Robotassistanse",
                         data = RegData, smd = T, test = F)|> 
  print(smd = T)
                          Stratified by Robotassistanse
                           0             1             SMD   
  n                         1146          1245

  ASA_kat = 3/4 (%)          294 (25.7)    258 (20.7)   0.117
  straaling = TRUE (%)       235 (20.5)    342 (27.5)   0.164
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat (%)                              0.073

  bmi_forenklet (%)                                     0.073

     undervekt                18 ( 1.6)     16 ( 1.3)        
     overvekt                447 (39.0)    525 (42.2)        
     fedme                   208 (18.2)    228 (18.3)

cobalt::bal.plot(
  matched_data_complete,
  which = "both",
  var.name = "distance",
  type = "histogram",
  mirror = TRUE
)

• colour : "Treatment"
cobalt::love.plot(
  formel,
  weights = list(w1 = cobalt::get.w(matched_data_complete)),
  data = RegData,
  binary = "std",
  thresholds = c(m = .1),
  abs = T
)
Note: `s.d.denom` not specified; assuming "pooled".
outcome.formula1 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse
outcome.formula2 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse + 
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat +
  erMann + alder_kat +
  straaling + ASA_kat +
  bmi_forenklet
outcome.formula3 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse + 
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat +
  erMann + alder_kat +
  straaling + ASA_kat + 
  bmi_forenklet + NyStomi

outcome.model1 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula1,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)
outcome.model2 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula2,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)
outcome.model3 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula3,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)


exp(coef((outcome.model1)))

RegData <- RegData_alle

scatter3 <- RegData |> summarise(N = n(),
                     .by = c(Sykehusnavn, Aar))
scatter1 <- RegData |> summarise(andel_rob = sum(Robotassistanse)/n()*100,
                     .by = c(Sykehusnavn, Aar)) #|> 
  # tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Aar, values_from = andel_rob)

scatter2 <- RegData |> summarise(andel_lekk = sum(Anastomoselekkasje)/n()*100,
                     .by = c(Sykehusnavn, Aar)) #|> 
  # tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Aar, values_from = andel_rob)
scatterplotdata <- merge(scatter1, scatter2, by = c("Sykehusnavn", "Aar")) |> 
  merge(scatter3, by = c("Sykehusnavn", "Aar")) #|> 
  # filter(N>20)

shusmapping <- data.frame(shus = unique(scatterplotdata$Sykehusnavn),
                          shusnr = 1:length(unique(scatterplotdata$Sykehusnavn)))

scatterplotdata$Sykehusnavn <- shusmapping$shusnr[match(
  scatterplotdata$Sykehusnavn, shusmapping$shus)]

write.csv2(scatterplotdata, "scatterplotdata.csv", row.names = F)
write.csv2(shusmapping, "shusmapping.csv", row.names = F, fileEncoding = "Latin1")

# plot(scatterplotdata$andel_rob, scatterplotdata$andel_lekk)

# table(RegData[,c("Sykehusnavn", "Robotassistanse")])
## både robot og konv >= 5

RegData <- RegData_alle |> 
  filter(!is.na(AvstandAnalVerge_kat),
         !is.na(BMI),
         Sykehusnavn %in% c(
           "Ahus", "Haukeland", "SI-Hamar", "Skien", 
           "SI-Kristiansand", "Tønsberg","OUS-Ullevål", "Stavanger", "St. Olavs",
           "UNN-Tromsø", "VV-Drammen"))

tmp <- RegData |> 
  select("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
         "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet", "Aar") |>
  mutate(ASA_kat = as.factor(ASA_kat) |> as.numeric(),
         straaling = as.numeric(straaling),
         AvstandAnalVerge_kat = as.numeric(AvstandAnalVerge_kat),
         bmi_forenklet = as.numeric(bmi_forenklet)
  ) |> 
  as.matrix()

training_data <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data = tmp, 
  label = RegData$Robotassistanse)

params_list <- list(
  objective = "binary:logistic",
  eval_metric = c("logloss"),
  eta = 0.01,
  max_depth = 4
)

set.seed(46)

model_xgbcv <- xgb.cv(
  params = params_list,
  data = training_data,
  nrounds = 1000,
  nfold = 5, 
  stratified = TRUE,
  early_stopping_rounds = 50,
  maximize = FALSE,
  prediction = TRUE,       
  verbose = 0
)

best_iter = model_xgbcv$best_iteration
final_model <- xgb.train(params_list, training_data, nrounds = best_iter)

ps <- predict(final_model, training_data)

formel <- Robotassistanse ~ 1  + 
  erMann + alder_kat +
  ASA_kat + straaling +
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat + bmi_forenklet + Aar

matched_data_complete <- MatchIt::matchit(formula = Robotassistanse ~ 1,
                                          data = RegData, distance = ps, 
                                          caliper = 0.01, std.caliper = T
)
matched_data <- MatchIt::match_data(matched_data_complete)
tableone::CreateTableOne(vars = c("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
                                  "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet", "Aar"), 
                         strata = "Robotassistanse",
                         data = RegData, smd = T, test = F)|> 
  print(smd = T)

  ASA_kat = 3/4 (%)            112 (22.9)      218 (20.4)   0.060
  straaling = TRUE (%)          75 (15.3)      264 (24.7)   0.236
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat (%)                                  0.070
     6.0-10.9 cm               216 (44.1)      486 (45.5)        
     0-5.9 cm                   33 ( 6.7)       63 ( 5.9)        
     11.0-15.9 cm              190 (38.8)      392 (36.7)        
     Ikke målt                  51 (10.4)      128 (12.0)        
  bmi_forenklet (%)                                         0.069
     normal                    201 (41.0)      409 (38.3)        
     undervekt                  10 ( 2.0)       18 ( 1.7)

                                  "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet", "Aar"), 
                         strata = "Robotassistanse",
                         data = matched_data, smd = T, test = F) |> 
  print(smd = T)

                           0               1               SMD   
  n                            386             386               
  erMann (mean (SD))          0.61 (0.49)     0.59 (0.49)   0.037
  Alder (mean (SD))          66.98 (10.81)   67.09 (10.29)  0.010
  ASA_kat = 3/4 (%)             89 (23.1)       73 (18.9)   0.102
  straaling = TRUE (%)          56 (14.5)       54 (14.0)   0.015
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat (%)                                  0.046
     6.0-10.9 cm               174 (45.1)      174 (45.1)        
     0-5.9 cm                   25 ( 6.5)       23 ( 6.0)        
     11.0-15.9 cm              146 (37.8)      143 (37.0)        
     Ikke målt                  41 (10.6)       46 (11.9)        
  bmi_forenklet (%)                                         0.138
     normal                    160 (41.5)      148 (38.3)        
     undervekt                   5 ( 1.3)        6 ( 1.6)        
     overvekt                  160 (41.5)      151 (39.1)        
     fedme                      61 (15.8)       81 (21.0)        
  Aar (mean (SD))          2021.61 (1.72)  2021.19 (1.61)   0.254
cobalt::bal.plot(
  matched_data_complete,
  which = "both",
  var.name = "distance",
  type = "histogram",
  mirror = TRUE
)
Ignoring unknown labels:
• colour : "Treatment"
cobalt::love.plot(
  formel,
  weights = list(w1 = cobalt::get.w(matched_data_complete)),
  data = RegData,
  binary = "std",
  thresholds = c(m = .1),
  abs = T
)
Note: `s.d.denom` not specified; assuming "pooled".
outcome.formula1 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse
outcome.formula2 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse + 
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat +
  erMann + alder_kat +
  straaling + ASA_kat +
  bmi_forenklet 
outcome.formula3 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse + 
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat +
  erMann + alder_kat +
  straaling + ASA_kat + 
  bmi_forenklet + NyStomi

outcome.model1 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula1,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)
outcome.model2 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula2,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)
outcome.model3 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula3,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)

     0.05753425      1.67884199

bmi_forenkletovervekt             1.161825e+00 4.690901e+00
bmi_forenkletfedme                5.983862e-01 3.607330e+00
NyStomi                           6.894046e-02 4.307261e-01
##sykehus inkludert i matchingen

RegData <- RegData_alle |> 
  filter(!is.na(AvstandAnalVerge_kat),
         !is.na(BMI),
         Sykehusnavn %in% c(
           "Ahus", "Haukeland", "SI-Hamar", "Skien", 
           "SI-Kristiansand", "Tønsberg","OUS-Ullevål", 
           "Stavanger", "St. Olavs", "SØ-Kalnes",
           "UNN-Tromsø", "VV-Drammen"))

tmp <- RegData |> 
  select("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
         "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet", "Sykehusnavn", "Aar") |>
  mutate(ASA_kat = as.factor(ASA_kat) |> as.numeric(),
         straaling = as.numeric(straaling),
         AvstandAnalVerge_kat = as.numeric(AvstandAnalVerge_kat),
         bmi_forenklet = as.numeric(bmi_forenklet),
         Sykehusnavn = as.factor(Sykehusnavn) |> as.numeric()
  ) |> 
  as.matrix()

training_data <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data = tmp, 
  label = RegData$Robotassistanse)

params_list <- list(
  objective = "binary:logistic",
  eval_metric = c("logloss"),
  eta = 0.01,
  max_depth = 4
)

set.seed(46)

model_xgbcv <- xgb.cv(
  params = params_list,
  data = training_data,
  nrounds = 1000,
  nfold = 5, 
  stratified = TRUE,
  early_stopping_rounds = 50,
  maximize = FALSE,
  prediction = TRUE,       
  verbose = 0
)

best_iter = model_xgbcv$best_iteration
final_model <- xgb.train(params_list, training_data, nrounds = best_iter)

ps <- predict(final_model, training_data)

formel <- Robotassistanse ~ 1  + 
  erMann + alder_kat +
  ASA_kat + straaling +
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat + bmi_forenklet + Sykehusnavn +Aar

matched_data_complete <- MatchIt::matchit(formula = Robotassistanse ~ 1,
                                          data = RegData, distance = ps, 
                                          caliper = 0.03, std.caliper = T
)
matched_data <- MatchIt::match_data(matched_data_complete)
tableone::CreateTableOne(vars = c("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
                                  "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet","Sykehusnavn", "Aar"), 
                         strata = "Robotassistanse",
                         data = RegData, smd = T, test = F)|> 
  print(smd = T)
                          Stratified by Robotassistanse

  straaling = TRUE (%)          83 (15.7)      267 (23.9)   0.208
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat (%)                                  0.035
     6.0-10.9 cm               235 (44.3)      508 (45.4)        
     0-5.9 cm                   33 ( 6.2)       68 ( 6.1)        
     11.0-15.9 cm              203 (38.3)      411 (36.8)

                                  "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet","Sykehusnavn", "Aar"), 
                         strata = "Robotassistanse",
                         data = matched_data, smd = T, test = F) |> 
  print(smd = T)

outcome.formula1 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse
outcome.formula2 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse + 
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat +
  erMann + alder_kat +
  straaling + ASA_kat +
  bmi_forenklet

  AvstandAnalVerge_kat +
  erMann + alder_kat +
  straaling + ASA_kat + 
  bmi_forenklet + NyStomi

outcome.model1 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula1,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)
outcome.model2 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula2,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)

  formula = outcome.formula3,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)

RegData <- RegData_alle |> 
  filter(!is.na(AvstandAnalVerge_kat),
         !is.na(BMI))
# dplyr::filter(aar_erfaring_shus2 == 3 | Robotassistanse == 0)

model_samlet <- glm(Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse + 
                      erMann + alder_kat +
                      ASA_kat + straaling +
                      AvstandAnalVerge_kat + bmi_forenklet +
                      Sykehusnavn + aar_erfaring_shus2,
                    data = RegData |> 
                      mutate(aar_erfaring_shus2=as.factor(aar_erfaring_shus2)), 
                    family = "binomial")

model_samlet <- glm(Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse + 
                      erMann + alder_kat +
                      ASA_kat + straaling +
                      AvstandAnalVerge_kat + bmi_forenklet +
                      Sykehusnavn + NyStomi,
                    data = RegData %>% filter(!is.na(AvstandAnalVerge_kat),
                                              !is.na(BMI)), 
                    family = "binomial")
exp(coef((model_samlet)))
                     (Intercept)                  Robotassistanse 
                      0.03942926                       1.49089510 
                          erMann                 alder_kat(65,80] 
                      2.75268885                       0.82511723 
               alder_kat(80,140]                       ASA_kat3/4 
                      0.41960720                       1.16028986 
                   straalingTRUE     AvstandAnalVerge_kat0-5.9 cm 
                      1.35416286                       0.44732398

# lekkasjerate i begge grupper over år
# tidsplot
# oppdater flytskjema
library(ggplot2)

RegData <- RegData_alle

tidsplotdata <- RegData |> 
  mutate(Robotassistanse = factor(Robotassistanse, levels=0:1, 
                                  labels=c("Laparoscopic", "Robotic"))) |> 
  summarise(ant_lekk = sum(Anastomoselekkasje),
            N = n(),
            andel = ant_lekk/N,
            .by = c(Aar, Robotassistanse)) |> 
  mutate(pkt_tekst = paste0(ant_lekk, "/", N))

p <- ggplot(tidsplotdata, aes(x = Aar, y = andel, color = Robotassistanse)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point() + 
  geom_text(aes(label = pkt_tekst), # Map the denominator column to the label
            vjust = -2,
            size = 3,                  # Adjust label size
            color = "black") +         # Set label color
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent,
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))) +
  expand_limits(y = 0) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = sort(unique(tidsplotdata$Aar))) +
  labs(title = "Anastomotic leakage",
       x = "Year",
       y = "Proportion",
       color = "Abdominal access") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

p
ggsave(filename = "C:/Users/kth200/regdata/norgast/robotartikkel/lekkasje_tid.svg", plot = p, width = 7, height = 5, units = "in")
RegData <- RegData_alle |> 
  filter(AvstandAnalVerge_kat != "Ikke målt",
         !is.na(BMI))

tmp <- RegData |> 
  select("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
         "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet",  
         "Aar") |>
  mutate(ASA_kat = as.factor(ASA_kat) |> as.numeric(),
         straaling = as.numeric(straaling),
         AvstandAnalVerge_kat = as.numeric(AvstandAnalVerge_kat),
         bmi_forenklet = as.numeric(bmi_forenklet),
  ) |> 
  as.matrix()

training_data <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data = tmp, 
  label = RegData$Robotassistanse)

params_list <- list(
  objective = "binary:logistic",
  eval_metric = c("logloss"),
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4
)

set.seed(45)

model_xgbcv <- xgb.cv(
  params = params_list,
  data = training_data,
  nrounds = 1000,
  nfold = 5, 
  stratified = TRUE,
  early_stopping_rounds = 50,
  maximize = FALSE,
  prediction = TRUE,       
  verbose = 0
)

best_iter = model_xgbcv$best_iteration
final_model <- xgb.train(params_list, training_data, nrounds = best_iter)

ps <- predict(final_model, training_data)

formel <- Robotassistanse ~ 1  + 
  erMann + alder_kat +
  ASA_kat + straaling +
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat + bmi_forenklet

matched_data_complete <- MatchIt::matchit(formula = Robotassistanse ~ 1,
                                          data = RegData, distance = ps, 
                                          caliper = 0.15, std.caliper = T,
                                          # ratio = 1,
)
matched_data <- MatchIt::match_data(matched_data_complete)
tableone::CreateTableOne(vars = c("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
                                  "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet",  
                                  "Aar"), 
                         strata = "Robotassistanse",
                         data = RegData, smd = T, test = F)|> 
  print(smd = T) |> 
  openxlsx::write.xlsx("tab_unmatched.xlsx", rowNames = T)
                          Stratified by Robotassistanse
                           0               1               SMD   
  n                           1003            1229               
  erMann (mean (SD))          0.58 (0.49)     0.62 (0.49)   0.075
  Alder (mean (SD))          67.45 (10.69)   64.63 (11.45)  0.254
  ASA_kat = 3/4 (%)            259 (25.8)      262 (21.3)   0.106
  straaling = TRUE (%)         190 (18.9)      348 (28.3)   0.222
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat (%)                                  0.050
     6.0-10.9 cm               514 (51.2)      611 (49.7)        
     0-5.9 cm                   91 ( 9.1)      102 ( 8.3)        
     11.0-15.9 cm              398 (39.7)      516 (42.0)        
     Ikke målt                   0 ( 0.0)        0 ( 0.0)        
  bmi_forenklet (%)                                         0.046
     normal                    404 (40.3)      470 (38.2)        
     undervekt                  16 ( 1.6)       21 ( 1.7)        
     overvekt                  402 (40.1)      517 (42.1)        
     fedme                     181 (18.0)      221 (18.0)        
  Aar (mean (SD))          2021.68 (1.77)  2022.38 (1.77)   0.396
tableone::CreateTableOne(vars = c("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
                                  "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet",  
                                  "Aar"), 
                         strata = "Robotassistanse",
                         data = matched_data, smd = T, test = F) |> 
  print(smd = T) |> 
  openxlsx::write.xlsx("tab_matched.xlsx", rowNames = T)
                          Stratified by Robotassistanse
                           0               1               SMD   
  n                            805             805

  ASA_kat = 3/4 (%)            167 (20.7)      176 (21.9)   0.027
  straaling = TRUE (%)         163 (20.2)      167 (20.7)   0.012
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat (%)                                  0.092
     6.0-10.9 cm               407 (50.6)      407 (50.6)

     overvekt                  331 (41.1)      327 (40.6)        
     fedme                     145 (18.0)      140 (17.4)

cobalt::bal.plot(
  matched_data_complete,
  which = "both",
  var.name = "distance",
  type = "histogram",
  mirror = TRUE
)
Ignoring unknown labels:
• colour : "Treatment"
cobalt::love.plot(
  formel,
  weights = list(w1 = cobalt::get.w(matched_data_complete)),
  data = RegData,
  binary = "std",
  thresholds = c(m = .1),
  abs = T
)
Note: `s.d.denom` not specified; assuming "pooled".
outcome.formula1 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse
outcome.formula2 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse + 
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat +
  erMann + alder_kat + Aar +
  straaling + ASA_kat + 
  bmi_forenklet
outcome.formula3 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse + 
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat +
  erMann + alder_kat + Aar +
  straaling + ASA_kat + 
  bmi_forenklet + NyStomi

outcome.model1 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula1,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)
outcome.model2 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula2,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)
outcome.model3 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula3,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)


exp(coef((outcome.model1)))
    (Intercept) Robotassistanse 
     0.06200528      2.03005505 
exp(confint((outcome.model1)))

RegData <- RegData_alle |> 
  filter(!is.na(BMI))


tmp <- RegData |> 
  select("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
         "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet",  
         "Aar") |>
  mutate(ASA_kat = as.factor(ASA_kat) |> as.numeric(),
         straaling = as.numeric(straaling),
         AvstandAnalVerge_kat = as.numeric(AvstandAnalVerge_kat),
         bmi_forenklet = as.numeric(bmi_forenklet),
  ) |> 
  as.matrix()

training_data <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data = tmp, 
  label = RegData$Robotassistanse)

params_list <- list(
  objective = "binary:logistic",
  eval_metric = c("logloss"),
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4
)

set.seed(45)

model_xgbcv <- xgb.cv(
  params = params_list,
  data = training_data,
  nrounds = 1000,
  nfold = 5, 
  stratified = TRUE,
  early_stopping_rounds = 50,
  maximize = FALSE,
  prediction = TRUE,       
  verbose = 0
)

best_iter = model_xgbcv$best_iteration
final_model <- xgb.train(params_list, training_data, nrounds = best_iter)

ps <- predict(final_model, training_data)

formel <- Robotassistanse ~ 1  + 
  erMann + alder_kat +
  ASA_kat + straaling +
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat + bmi_forenklet

matched_data_complete <- MatchIt::matchit(formula = Robotassistanse ~ 1,
                                          data = RegData, distance = ps, 
                                          caliper = 0.15, std.caliper = T,
                                          # ratio = 1,
)
matched_data <- MatchIt::match_data(matched_data_complete)
tableone::CreateTableOne(vars = c("erMann", "Alder", "ASA_kat", "straaling",
                                  "AvstandAnalVerge_kat", "bmi_forenklet",  
                                  "Aar"), 
                         strata = "Robotassistanse",
                         data = RegData, smd = T, test = F)|> 
  print(smd = T) |> 
  openxlsx::write.xlsx("tab_unmatched.xlsx", rowNames = T)
                          Stratified by Robotassistanse
                           0               1               SMD   
  n                           1146            1389

  ASA_kat = 3/4 (%)            294 (25.7)      298 (21.5)   0.099
  straaling = TRUE (%)         235 (20.5)      384 (27.6)   0.168
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat (%)                                  0.055
     6.0-10.9 cm               514 (44.9)      611 (44.0)        
     0-5.9 cm                   91 ( 7.9)      102 ( 7.3)

Note: `s.d.denom` not specified; assuming "pooled".
outcome.formula1 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse
outcome.formula2 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse + 
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat +
  erMann + alder_kat + Aar +
  straaling + ASA_kat + 
  bmi_forenklet
outcome.formula3 <- Anastomoselekkasje ~ 1 + Robotassistanse + 
  AvstandAnalVerge_kat +
  erMann + alder_kat + Aar +
  straaling + ASA_kat + 
  bmi_forenklet + NyStomi

outcome.model1 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula1,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)
outcome.model2 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula2,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)
outcome.model3 <- glm(
  formula = outcome.formula3,
  family = binomial,
  data = matched_data
)

     0.05929304      1.92111695

straalingTRUE                    7.012274e-01  1.802007e+00

bmi_forenkletovervekt            9.195956e-01  2.077950e+00

library(tidyr)

andel_robot_aar <- RegData |> 
  summarise(andel_rob = sum(Robotassistanse)/ n()*100, 
            N = n(), 
            .by = c(Sykehusnavn, Aar)) |> 
  janitor::adorn_totals() |> 
  mutate(andel_rob = paste0(round(andel_rob, 1), " (", N, ")")) |> 
  select(-N) |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(Aar), values_from = andel_rob)

knitr::kable(andel_robot_aar)
